issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect checks if the Leader has {Donquixote Pirates} type, not if a card is on board.
Missing 'type' parameter in condition. Should be: {"type":"LeaderHasType","value":"Donquixote Pirates"}
Action 'GiveDon' is incomplete. Missing 'setActive' parameter. Should include setActive:true to set DON!! as active per card text.
Second effect is incomplete. Missing second GiveDon action for 'add up to 2 DON!! cards from your DON!! deck and rest them'. Current DSL only has DrawCard and TrashFromHand.
TrashFromHand action missing 'rest' parameter or separate Rest action after. Card text says 'rest them' referring to the added DON!! cards, not the trashed card.
